# [CL-03] Proof-trace + audit-receipt + mesh route demo

> Plan ID `CL-03` — local plan identifier in this issue pack, **not** a
> GitHub issue number. See [`00_EPIC_2026.md`](00_EPIC_2026.md).

## Status

✅ **Done on γ-surface.** [`BENCHMARKS.md`](../../BENCHMARKS.md) Demo 3
chains explainability → composition → proof-trace → audit-log →
crc32 → blake3 → multi-tile-receipt → d2d-holo-mesh. The TG-TRIAD-X
anchor `0x47C0` gates the demo at reset (`sim/tb_canonical.v` — last
run 3 PASS, 0 FAIL).

## Evidence in this repo

- Demo: [`BENCHMARKS.md`](../../BENCHMARKS.md) §Demo 3
- Protocol index: [`D2D_PROTOCOL.md`](../../D2D_PROTOCOL.md)
- RTL: `src/explainability_unit.v`, `src/composition_kernel.v`,
  `src/proof_trace_writer.v`, `src/audit_log_ring_buffer.v`,
  `src/crc32_receipt.v`, `src/blake3_anchor.v`,
  `src/multi_tile_receipt.v`, `src/d2d_holo_mesh.v`,
  `src/trinity_mesh_2x2.v`, `src/trinity_router_2x2.v`
- Sim: `sim/tb_canonical.v` (anchor stable across 20 cycles);
  `test/tb_proof_trace_writer.v` (ALL ASSERTIONS PASS at last run).

## Acceptance criteria

- [x] Per-decision CRC32 receipt emitted.
- [x] BLAKE3 anchor advances per decision.
- [x] Cross-tile receipt round-trip in simulation.
- [x] Canonical anchor stable on `{uio_out, uo_out}` = `0x47C0`.
- [x] Interconnect protocol frozen at v1.0 / TTSKY26b
      (`docs/INTERCONNECT_PROTOCOL_V1.md`).

## R5 honesty

Demo is **simulation-only**. Packaged-board signal-integrity
measurements remain pending silicon return — no D2D measurement is
claimed by this repo.
